acceptance_criteria.then: At least one match is returned — confirms the sentinel check is wired into the hook

check.expect: at least one line with match_sentinel_grant_for_write

acceptance_criteria.given: A valid unexpired sentinel grant at /tmp/claude-grants/<task_id>.json with allowed_operations=[{op:'Write', target:'<file_path>'}] and grant.session_id matching current session; agent_id absent from hook input (main-agent)
acceptance_criteria.when: hooks/pretool-write-guard.sh is invoked as a PreToolUse hook with Write tool targeting that existing file
acceptance_criteria.then: Exit code is 0 (write authorized by sentinel grant)

check.method: bash smoke test with crafted stdin payload + synthetic sentinel at /tmp/claude-grants/
cases: main-agent + matching sentinel on existing file: exit 0
main-agent + no sentinel on existing file: exit 2 (baseline verification)

acceptance_criteria.when: git show HEAD:hooks/posttool-allowlist-consume.py | grep -n "tool_name == .Write" is executed

acceptance_criteria.given: This is a verification-only cycle — the requirement is already implemented in HEAD e109534c
acceptance_criteria.then: dev-report.dev.files_modified is empty ([]) and dev-report.dev.files_created is empty ([]); git diff HEAD -- hooks/pretool-write-guard.sh hooks/lib/allowlist.py hooks/posttool-allowlist-consume.py shows no changes introduced by this cycle

cases: git diff HEAD on the three target hook files shows no cycle-introduced changes
